issues_found: PUBLISHED_AT metadata shows '2026-01-15' but article body clearly states 'Published on 09 April 2026'; the April date is internally consistent with the content (survey covers Q1 2026 to end-February, conducted Feb 23 - Mar 13, 2026); likely metadata error from RSS extraction; April 2026 date is correct

event_type 'research_paper' is valid but borderline appropriate; this is an official statistical survey/report, not an academic research paper; 'economic_commentary' might be more precise, but 'research_paper' is not wrong given the broad taxonomy
human_review_reason: The record is well-constructed and accurately reflects the source material. The PUBLISHED_AT discrepancy is notable but the record correctly uses the article body date for content. Minor classification ambiguity on event_type does not warrant human escalation.
